task: Continue the Lalin-native Lua VM source compiler implementation with a substantial source compiler push. Start from current tree. Implement as much real Lua 5.5 source compiler capability end-to-end as feasible, prioritizing features that can execute on the existing VM: expanded lexer tokens/keywords, assignments, calls, local function/function expressions/closures if feasible, table constructors if feasible, varargs, if/while/numeric for if feasible. If runtime gaps block compiler tests, implement necessary minimal VM semantics. Preserve explicit discipline, PUC as oracle-only, no SponJIT. Add/adjust tests that compile source and run through VM. Report exact files/features/blockers/tests.
